name: scenario-codex-plugin
description: Codex plugin for Scenario creative generation workflows through the official Scenario MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Use Scenario models and assets from Codex through MCP.
interface.longDescription: Connects Codex to the official Scenario MCP server for model discovery, budget previews, usage reporting, asset workflows, and creative generation planning with OAuth authentication.
defaultPrompt: Find a Scenario model for game assets.
Dry-run a Scenario generation and report Creative Units.
